title: Sylve's Galaxy Gui
description: Make minecraft look like its out of this world! Purple and green alien theme for your hotbar :3
body:
# 👽 **Sylve's Galaxy Gui** 🛸

🎉 Make minecraft look out of this world 🎉

## ✨ **Features** ✨
- 💜 **Purple & Green Theme** - Cute pastel alien colors! 
- 👾 **Alien-inspired Design** - Get abducted in the design~
- 🛸 **Out of this world experience** - New hearts, exp bars, hunger, etc!!!
- 💚 **Cute & Fun** - Perfect for space explorers who love adorable aesthetics!

## 🎊 **What's Included** 🎊
- 👽 **Alien Vibes**

---

**Ready to blast off?** 🚀
Download now and give your Minecraft that cosmic makeover it deserves! 

*Perfect for builders, adventurers, and anyone who wants their game to look absolutely* ***stellar*** *! ⭐*

---

**💜 Made with love by Sylve 💚**
